description:
Files: src/ir_interp.rs

At Term::TailCall eval arm, when is_back_edge:
  if FZ_SHOULD_YIELD.load(Relaxed) != 0 {
      coerce args to Tagged, spill to mid_flight_roots
      set mid_flight_fn_id, mid_flight_root_count, state=Ready
      FZ_SHOULD_YIELD.store(0)
      return interpreter yield sentinel
  }

Scheduler re-enters run_quantum with mid_flight_fn_id!=0. If function has a JIT resume shim, use it. If interp-only, scheduler re-dispatches through interpreter from mid_flight_roots slab.

Tests: fz-sched.12 integration cases via interp mode.
title: fz-sched.10: Interpreter parity — back-edge check in eval loop
